moduleSummary.blockSummary: **Junior Java Backend Developer** building **Spring Boot REST APIs** with **Spring Security (JWT)**, **Spring Data JPA**, and **SQL**. Developed portfolio projects including an **AI-powered CV generator** (job scraping + **SSE** live progress) and a **PDF document layout engine** (ECS + **auto-pagination**). Strong foundation in **Core/Advanced Java**, plus prior engineering leadership experience. Focused on **clean architecture**, **automation**, and **reliable backend services**.

technicalSkills.name: Technical Skills
modulePoints: **Languages:** Java (*17/21*), SQL, Kotlin (*Basic*)
**Backend (Spring):** Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA (*Hibernate*), Spring Security, **JWT**, Validation, MapStruct, Lombok, Swagger/**OpenAPI**, Jackson
**API & Security:** REST design, stateless auth, role-based authorization, BCrypt, CORS, input validation/sanitization
**Core Java:** OOP, Collections, Streams API, Multithreading, Concurrency (*ExecutorService*, *Locks*), IO/NIO, JDBC, Reflection, Annotations, Optional, Record
**Databases:** MySQL, Oracle SQL, SQLite, MongoDB (*Basic*)
**DevOps & Tools:** Git/GitHub, Maven, Docker, Docker Compose, Flyway, Postman, IntelliJ IDEA, Nginx (*Basic*)
**Web Scraping:** Playwright (*headless automation*), Jsoup (*HTML parsing*), anti-bot techniques (*User-Agent rotation*, *delays*)
**AI Integration:** Google **Gemini API**, OpenAI/**DeepSeek** (*Basic*), prompt design, **JSON schema-driven outputs**, streaming responses, token usage tracking
**Document Generation:** Apache **PDFBox**, Markdown rendering (*Flexmark*), YAML config (*SnakeYAML*), layout/templating systems

modulePoints: **Spring Boot & REST API Mastery** – *Ongoing*
Apr 2024 – Present - RESTful APIs with Spring Boot, DTOs, Security with JWT, CRUD, Postman testing.
**Oracle SQL Course** – Self-Study Jan 2024 – Jun 2024 - Mastered DDL/DML, joins, transactions, views, and sequences using Oracle SQL tools.
**Advanced Java Course (OCA-aligned)** – Self-Study Dec 2023 – Jan 2024 - Covered multithreading, Streams API, JDBC, functional programming, and reflection.

**BSc in Hydraulic Engineering** Kherson State Agrarian and Economic University, Ukraine

projects.name: Projects
modulePoints: **CVRewriter** *(Spring Boot + React + AI + Scraping)* – ***Freelance-style*** full-stack app for generating tailored CV PDFs from vacancy links. Implemented **JWT auth**, vacancy processing pipeline (*Playwright scraping*), **SSE real-time progress**, CV editor, regenerate flow, and record history/status tracking. Integrated multiple AI providers (**Gemini / GPT / DeepSeek**), schema-based CV generation, and **token usage analytics** for each request. Stack: Java 17+, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JPA, MySQL, Flyway, Playwright, React + TypeScript, Docker Compose, Nginx.

**GraphCompose** *(Java/Kotlin PDF Layout Engine)* – ***Freelance-style*** declarative document generation engine using **ECS architecture**. Built a **layout system** (*VContainer/HContainer*) with alignment, margin/padding, anchors, and a **two-pass** measurement/layout approach. Implemented **smart pagination** with **breakable nested containers** to split content across pages while preserving constraints (*padding/borders*). Stack: Java 21 / Kotlin, Apache **PDFBox**, Flexmark (*Markdown*), SnakeYAML, Lombok.

**Shopping Cart API** *(Spring Boot + JWT + JPA)* – ***Freelance-style*** backend e-commerce project. Secure API with authentication, role-based access, product management, and cart operations (*CRUD + validation*). Stack: Spring Boot, JPA, MySQL, Spring Security, Postman, MapStruct, Swagger.

**Custom GeminiConnection** – ***Freelance-style*** Java client for Google’s Gemini API. Supports generation configuration, **streaming responses**, image requests, and structured **JSON output parsing** for application integration.
**AnkiQuestionGeneration** – ***Freelance-style*** helper tool for learning workflows. Parser + AI-powered converter that transforms Notion HTML notes into Anki flashcards using **Gemini** + SQLite.

**CocktailScrapper** – ***Freelance-style*** data collection tool for cocktail recipes. Multithreaded recipe scraper with Jsoup, storage support (MongoDB/MySQL), and anti-bot rotation (*User-Agent + delays*).
**BlackJack CLI Game** – Personal console project demonstrating OOP and control flow. Java console game implementing object-oriented principles and clean game flow logic.

Designed and implemented quality protocols, reducing critical errors and write-offs significantly.
Mentored and trained 8 team members, supporting growth into leadership roles.
